params.context: Batch F-16: zeta probe (Phase 1 URL discovery + accessibility check). Korean character AI platform, 5247만h #1 사용시간 in 2025. APF NOT YET REGISTERED — this probe is to establish URL/accessibility/login requirement. Try URLs in order. Service is for character chat (anime-style avatars). Look for chat input + send mechanism + response API endpoint pattern.

devtools_check_instructions: 1. Try URLs in order — first reachable wins
3. Anonymous mode 시도, 로그인 강제 시 report URL + landing screenshot
4. If accessible: pick a character + try sending prompt (or anonymous trial chat)
5. Capture (a) confirmed URL, (b) endpoint pattern, (c) Content-Type, (d) response format snippet

notes: Batch F-16 zeta initial probe — APF unregistered, gathering Phase 1 baseline.
